signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Our personal loan borrowers' weighted average income is $164,000 with a weighted average FICO score of 746 — no stress signals in borrower quality or deposit behavior.
signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our on-balance sheet 90-day personal loan delinquency rate was 57 basis points in the quarter, a decrease from 64 basis points in Q2, which is further evidence of surpassing a peak in Q1.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We've been able to maintain pricing in down rate environments due to the quality of our product... we're now generating close to $400 million in origination fees annually.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Today, we face fewer headwinds than any point in our history. We're heading into 2025 with the most favorable conditions of the last seven years.
